titleStmt.title: SII 15.77: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 77. (B.K. No. 86 of 1928-29.) KOṆṆŪR, BILGI PETHA, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a broken stone standing in the temple of Hanumān.

The epigraph gives the genealogy of the Chālukya family from Vikramāditya VI and refers itself to the reign of Sōmēśvara IV. It then introduces his feudatory brothers Vīra Bijjala and Vīra Vikrama of the Sinda family, whose ancestry also is described. It also narrates the forbears of the king's minister and general Tējirāja of the Gautama gōtra. He was son of Bhāyila, grandson of Tejarāja and great-grandson of Nannapayya. The rest of the inscription giving the details of date and gift is entirely obliterated. The composition which is in Kannaḍa contains a few descriptive passages in Sanskrit.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . lakṣmīmādivarāhasya daṁṣṭrāṁ turaṁ yatra prōdva ḷannīlaśālabhaṁjīsriyaṁ
dadhau . Asti bhāratabhūbhāgē kuṁtaḷākhyaṁ mahākulaṁ cāḷukyanāmadhēyānāṁ visru
taṁ cakravartthināṁ . rājaratnākarē tasmiṁnnaśēsaguṇaśālini bahavaḥ kṣatriyūḥ pūrvvaṁ jajñirē bharatōpamā[ḥ .]
svasti śrīmaccāḷukyāvvayagaganaśaraccārucaṁdraṁ samastōrvvī(ṁ) stutyaṁ vikramāditya nripana(ṁ) tanayaṁ kā
minīkāmanastōkasōṁ(sō)maṁ sōmanaṁdhradraviḍaṁ māgadha nēpāḷabhūpāḷa mastakanyasta śrī pādapadmaṁ sa
kaḷabudhanutaṁ rājasarvvajñabhūpaṁ . Enisida sōmēśvaradēvane sutanadhikaṁ pratāpa cakrēśvaraneṁba negartthevaḍeda
ḷāvaniyoḷu jagadēkamallanapratimalla tadanujanudāravīrara sadanaṁ ripunripāḷa madagaja
dura nijakhaḍgahariyenipadaṭiṁ traiḷōkyamalla nūrmmaḍibhūpaṁ . svasti samastabhū (bhu)vanāśrayaṁ śrī prithvīvallabha
mahārājādhirājaparamēśvaraṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīma(r)(ṁ)nno rmmaḍi traiḷōkyamalladē
vara priyaputranappa vīrasōmēśvaradēvana vijayarājyamuttarōttarābhivṛddhipravarddha mānamācaṁ
drārkkatāraṁ sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁ geyuttamire . tatpādapadmabhaktisamutpādita vita
rtthiripunripadhātrībhṛtpavi samastapuṁṇya samutpaṁnnaṁ vīrabijjalōrvvīpālaṁ . Ā vīra bijjalakṣōṇīvallabhanādyahṛ
dyavaṁśada viśvōrbbīviditavāda kīrttivyāvarṇnana śōbhe tānadeṁtene . mattaṁ narapati gelda kaṭṭidalagācarasa
rōdbhavaṁ varatanu nākabhūmipatisiṁgarasaṁ kali pārtthivaṁ karamese dippa dāsarasana
ggada cauḍarasaṁ yaśasvi cāvarasananippa yadādi bhū(bhobhu) bhujaruṁ . hiriyā
carasana tanujaṁ parapārtthivasainyahari saṁ siṁgarasana pēśaḷaputraṁ paripaṁthiva rūthayūthama
nācarasaṁ vīraṁ vidagdhavibhudhādhāraṁ śauryyārjjitōrjjitākhiḷarājyaṁ cārutara kīrtti negaḷdaṁ vīraguṇaṁ supratāpa
caritacittaṁ permmāḍibhūpana(nu)ttamarūpaṁ . permmāḍidēvananatinirmmaḷakīrtthiprakāśi tāṣṭadigaṁtaṁ dharmmayu
tanugrasaṁgarakarmmaṭanānaṁdamūrtthi cāvuṁḍanripaṁ . Ātana naṁdananabhinavacētōjātaṁ satījanacaḷitavacananū
tana raghusutanativikhyātiyutaṁ vīrabijjala nṛpālaṁ . tadanujanagaṁṇyapuṇyaṁ sadamaḷavikhyātakīrtthi
mūrtthimukuṭaṁ kadanapracaṇḍanamapama siṁdakuḷa vīravikramadēvaṁ . śrīma ccāḷukya
cakravartthi vīrasōmēśvaradēvane mahā tējimayyadaṁḍanāyakananvayāva tārameṁteṁdaḍe . gautamagō
traprabhavaṁ nītividaṁ maṁtraśaktisādhitavairibrātaṁ vidagdhavibudhaprītikaraṁ naṁnapayya daṁḍādhīśaṁ . naṁnapadaṁḍēśasutaṁ
sannutacāritrayuktanuttamaguṇasaṁpannaṁ vadānyanaudāryyōṁnnatikaṁ tējarājadaṁḍā dhīśaṁ . tējacamūpana ta
nayaṁ rājīvasamānanētranamaḷayaśōvibhrājitanāśritajanasurabhūjaṁ bhāyilacamūpana prati
rūpaṁ . pāvanacaritada bhāgaladēviya pati bhāyipayya daṁḍēśaṁ gaurīvaravaradiṁ paḍedaṁ śrīvidana cikkatēja
daṁḍādhipanaṁ . cīlādēviya dayitaṁ śīlayutaṁ bhāyidēvanaṁ siddhanumaṁ līleyesuta
śrīlalitaṁ cikkatējadaṁḍādhīśaṁ . padya . jitaratipatirūpaḥ stutyanityapratāpaḥ sakaḷa sukavipālaḥ sa
tara kaṁjaḥ cāma vijyaḥ kritaśivapadabhāvaḥ kīrttyatē tējidēvaḥ svasti
nāśrayaṁ jādhirājaparamēśvaraṁ paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśra
pura nelavīḍiThe
Digital edition of SII 15.77 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
